rulings.Case Title: POODLES, INC., VS. ROGER C. KUHN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 18, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT THE ESTATE OF EDWARD C. BLAND MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS GRANTED. Estate of Edward Bland is not a proper defendant. Estates cannot sue or be sued. =(501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: POODLES, INC., VS. ROGER C. KUHN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Substitute Joan Bland For Estate Of Edward C. Bland
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 18, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF POODLES, INC., PATRICK & FRIENDS, INC., CBD PROPERTIES, LLC, JILL WILLIAMSON Notice Of Motion And Motion To Substitute Joan Bland For Estate Of Edward C. Bland DENIED. CCP 377.41 does not provide for the relief requested. Per CCP 377.41 a personal representative or a successor in interest may be substituted in place of a "decedent" not in place of "the estate of [a decedent]." Further, under CCP 377.20 a cause of action only survives the death of "a person who would have been liable." Plaintiff provides no argument or authority for the proposition that Mr. Bland, who died in June of 2009, would have been liable for the events occurring on or after August 1, 2012. Plaintiff further provides no facts or authority that Mr. Bland's interest at issue in this case was ever in his "estate" (e.g. was not in a trust) or could have passed to a "successor in interest" without a proper probate proceeding. The Court notes that on February 11, 2019 Plaintiff's ex-parte DOE amendment application was denied with instructions to file a regularly noticed motion for such relief, i.e. to name a proper party liable for the asserted breaches/wrongdoings occurring on or after August 1, 2012. No such motion was filed. =(501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: ANGELA LEUNG VS. STONESTOWN SHOPPING CENTER, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 18, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT STONESTOWN SHOPPING CENTER, LP DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT continued to October 18, 2019 for plaintiff to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of opposition no later than September 23, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court received courtesy copies of the moving papers and reply. =(501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: ANGELA LEUNG VS. STONESTOWN SHOPPING CENTER, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 18, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT STONESTOWN MEDICAL BUILDING, LLC. DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT continued to October 18, 2019 for parties to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers and opposition. Courtesy copies to be delivered to Department 501 no later than September 23, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court received a courtesy copy of reply. =(501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID POST VS. REDFIN CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 18, 2019 line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT ANDREW WARREN, VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend to allege facts regarding Vanguard's duty - e.g., actual knowledge of constraints, use restrictions and/or relative move in, or facts similar to Easton v. Strassburger (1984) 152 Cal.App.3d 90. =(501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID POST VS. REDFIN CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Cross-Defendants Vanguard Properties, Inc. And Andrew J. Warren To Strike Portions Of Cross-Complaint Of Chris Amarante
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 18, 2019 line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT ANDREW WARREN, VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Cross-Defendants Vanguard Properties, Inc. And Andrew J. Warren To Strike Portions Of Cross-Complaint Of Chris Amarante granted with leave to amend to allege facts indicating entitlement to attorney fees. =(501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: JULIANA CLEGG VS. WILMINGTON TRUST, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 18, 2019 line 5.
